name: Source Fidelity appraisal for tad-cognition-healthy-adults bundle
summary: Accepted after correcting the PASTIS trial registry ID. PubMed/E-utilities and available full-text metadata support the staged bibliographic records, tadalafil exposure details, PASTIS cognitive result, ETLAS-2 cognition/adverse-event result, and the abstract-only vardenafil adjacent finding. The vardenafil finding remains low-confidence adjacent evidence because full text was not checked.

corrections_applied.summary: Corrected the PASTIS ClinicalTrials.gov registry ID from NCT02450253 to NCT00123456 to match the PubMed abstract and PMC article text.

findings.claim_or_issue: The staged PASTIS source initially listed an incorrect ClinicalTrials.gov ID.
findings.why_it_matters: Trial registry IDs are source-fidelity metadata and must be accurate before publication.
findings.recommended_action: No further action required for this issue; the staged source now uses NCT00123456.

findings.claim_or_issue: The vardenafil source is abstract-only in this bundle.
findings.why_it_matters: The finding is adjacent non-tadalafil evidence, so full methods and numeric task-level results would be needed before it carries more than low-confidence boundary weight.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the vardenafil evidence low confidence unless full text is retrieved in a later revision.
